positive: A vibrant, central composition featuring a stylized woodland creature portrait (e.g., a fox, owl, or mythical fawn) integrated with lush, abstract botanical elements and geometric patterns. The style should be highly detailed neo-art nouveau meets modern vector illustration, emphasizing clean, strong silhouettes and bold outlines. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette (e.g., deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, emerald green, and cream white) suitable for screen printing. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, with elements spiraling outward from the main subject. The background should be simple or semi-transparent, allowing the central design to pop dramatically. Intricate linework, graphic design aesthetic, perfect for apparel placement.
negative: blur, deformed, amateur, messy, grainy, out of focus, bad anatomy, extra limbs, missing limbs, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, disfigured, noisy, jpeg artifacts, low detail, photographic, realistic, grayscale
